title: Where's Perry 64
summary: Where's Perry 64 is a ROM hack created by Dude45 and Pikmanfan2002 for the Music Themed Level Competition, in which it was not assigned a placement.

title: TsucnenT's Dream
summary: TsucnenT's Dream is a secret course located inside Sky High Castle in Super Mario Treasure World.

title: Super Mario 64: The Black Virus
summary: SM64 The Black Virus is an kaizo ROM hack created by NormalX71.

title: The Invitation 2: An Uninvited Guest
summary: The Invitation 2: An Uninvited Guest is a ROM hack created by furyiousfight.

title: SM64 The Green Virus
summary: SM64 The Green Virus is a ROM hack made by Motchy and NormalX71.

title: Wario's Farm: The Greed Comet Part 1
summary: Wario's Farm: The Greed Comet Part 1 is a ROM hack made by two collaborating creators- KingToad64 and ShrekSlaught.

title: Super Mario 64 Shining Stars DS
summary: Super Mario 64 Shining Stars DS is the upcoming enhanced port of Super Mario 64 Shining Stars for the DS.

title: Rhomb Simulator
summary: Rhomb Simulator is a small hack made by someone2639.

title: Super Speed Shell
summary: Super Speed Shell is a ROM hack made by Itsri.
